mapper.sql: error_id, error_code, message, stack_trace, request_id, created_at, operation_type, tenant_id, company_id, actor_user_id, actor_role, severity, status, payload_snapshot::text AS payload_snapshot, resolved_at, resolved_by, resolution_note
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO error_logs ( error_id, error_code, message, stack_trace, request_id, created_at, operation_type, tenant_id, company_id, actor_user_id, actor_role, severity, status, payload_snapshot ) VALUES ( #{errorId}, #{errorCode}, #{message}, #{stackTrace}, #{requestId}, now(), #{operationType}, #{tenantId}, #{companyId}, #{actorUserId}, #{actorRole}, #{severity}, #{status}, CAST(#{payloadSnapshot} AS jsonb) )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM error_logs ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT
FROM error_logs WHERE error_id = #{errorId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE error_logs SET status = #{status}, resolved_by = #{resolvedBy}, resolution_note = #{resolutionNote}, resolved_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'RESOLVED' THEN now() ELSE resolved_at END WHERE error_id = #{errorId}
